args: if ((Get-Item '${file_path}').length -gt 50KB) { Write-Host 'WARNING: CSS file over 50KB - performance concern' }
hooks.description: Check CSS file size for performance

args: if (Select-String -Path '${file_path}' -Pattern 'eval\(|exec\(|system\(|shell_exec\(' -Quiet) { Write-Host 'SECURITY WARNING: Potentially dangerous PHP functions detected' }
hooks.description: Security check for dangerous PHP functions

args: if (Select-String -Path '${file_path}' -Pattern '!important' -AllMatches | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count) { Write-Host 'CSS PERFORMANCE: Found !important declarations - consider refactoring' }
CSS file updated: ${file_path} - Remember to test mobile responsiveness
hooks.description: Log CSS changes with mobile reminder

args: if ((Get-Item '${file_path}').length -gt 25KB) { Write-Host 'WARNING: JS file over 25KB - consider code splitting' }
hooks.description: Check JS file size for performance

args: $filename = Split-Path '${file_path}' -Leaf; $cssFile = $filename -replace '\.php$', '.css'; $jsFile = $filename -replace '\.php$', '.js'; if (!(Test-Path "assets/css/$cssFile")) { Write-Host 'REMINDER: Create corresponding CSS file: assets/css/$cssFile' }; if (!(Test-Path "assets/js/$jsFile")) { Write-Host 'REMINDER: Create corresponding JS file: assets/js/$jsFile' }
hooks.description: Check for corresponding CSS/JS files for page templates

args: if (!(Select-String -Path '${file_path}' -Pattern 'MedicalBusiness|MedicalClinic|schema\.org' -Quiet)) { Write-Host 'SCHEMA WARNING: Medical schema markup may be missing' }
try { Get-Content '${file_path}' | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Write-Host 'JSON validation passed' } catch { Write-Host 'JSON VALIDATION ERROR: Invalid JSON syntax' }

Write-Host 'PERFORMANCE CHECKLIST:'; Write-Host '✓ Test Core Web Vitals (target: 90+)'; Write-Host '✓ Test mobile speed (target: 95+)'; Write-Host '✓ Verify load time < 3 seconds'; Write-Host '✓ Clear WP Rocket cache if needed'
